title: Lazy Notes
subtitle: Minimalist offline note-taking app
description: A simple Android app to create, edit and organize personal notes with instant search and dark mode.
longDescription:
## About

**Lazy Notes** is an Android app built in Kotlin that lets you create and organize notes quickly and simply.

### Features
- Offline note creation and editing
- Instant search by title or content
- Automatic dark mode
- Google Drive backup
- Material Design 3 interface
- No ads, no tracking

title: TaskFlow
subtitle: Collaborative task management
description: Web platform for team task management with kanban, calendar and real-time notifications.
longDescription:
## About

**TaskFlow** is a web app built with React and Node.js for team project and task management.

### Features
- Drag-and-drop kanban board
- Integrated calendar
- Real-time notifications (WebSocket)
- OAuth2 authentication (Google, GitHub)
- Documented RESTful API
- Dark/light mode

title: PDF Tools
subtitle: Collection of PDF utilities
description: Set of scripts and tools to manipulate PDF files: merge, split, compress and extract text.
longDescription:
## About

**PDF Tools** is an open-source collection of utilities for PDF file manipulation, developed in Python.

### Included tools
- **pdf-merge.py** — Joins multiple PDFs into a single file
- **pdf-split.py** — Splits a PDF into individual pages
- **pdf-compress.py** — Compresses PDFs to reduce file size
- **pdf-extract.py** — Extracts text from PDFs to TXT

All tools work via command line and support both Python 3.8+ and standalone executables.
